steps.title: Read two points on the line
steps.content: Two readable points on the line of best fit are approximately $(0{,}175)$ and $(10{,}575)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use change in temperature divided by change in time.
$$\frac{575-175}{10-0}=\frac{400}{10}=40$$

steps.title: Interpret the rate
steps.content: The positive slope means the predicted temperature increases by about $40^\circ\text{F}$ per hour over the $10$-hour period. The answer is C.
